steps.title: Find the shared role
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between Harcourt and Bennett. The notes show that both were actor-managers: each managed a theater and also performed there.

steps.title: Choose the parallel statement
steps.content: A mentions Bennett but not Harcourt. C falsely puts both at Covent Garden Theatre. D emphasizes a geographic difference. The parallel statement that both managed theaters where they performed captures the similarity. The answer is B.
